steps.requiredChange: Implement check that requesting agent has permission to grant requested permission
steps.evidenceRequired: Direct permission requests properly validated, unauthorized requests rejected

steps.requiredChange: Recursively validate the entire chain of how permissions were granted
steps.evidenceRequired: Intermediate permissions checked, chain of authority validated

steps.requiredChange: Detect and reject permission chains that form cycles
steps.evidenceRequired: Circular dependency attempts rejected, no privilege escalation loops

steps.requiredChange: Log all permission grants, revocations, and chain validations with timestamps
steps.evidenceRequired: Complete audit trail maintained, all permission changes traceable

haltCondition: All admissibility rules satisfied: chain validation, circular dependency detection, audit trail, and least privilege enforcement implemented
